    input [4:0] command,  
    output reg [4:0] status  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (command)  
            5'b00001: status = 5'b11110; // SUCCESS  
            5'b00010: status = 5'b11101; // ERROR  
            5'b00000: status = 5'b11111; // TIMEOUT  
            default: status = 5'b00000;   // UNKNOWN  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

module wifi_state_decoder (

);

        case (state)

            2'b10: status = 3'b010; // Connecting
            2'b11: status = 3'b011; // Connected
            2'b00: status = 3'b000; // Error
            default: status = 3'b000; // Default to Disconnected
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module NVMe_Command_Decoder(

    output reg [2:0] command_type  
);

        case (command)  
            5'b00001: command_type = 3'b001; // NOP  
            5'b00010: command_type = 3'b010; // READ  
            5'b00011: command_type = 3'b011; // WRITE  
            5'b00100: command_type = 3'b100; // FLUSH  
            5'b00000: command_type = 3'b000; // FORMAT  
            default: command_type = 3'b111;   // Unknown Command  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

module barrel_shifter (
    input [7:0] data_in,      // 8-bit input data
    input [1:0] shift_amount,  // 2-bit shift amount (0-3)
    input direction,           // 0 for left shift, 1 for right shift
    output reg [7:0] data_out  // 8-bit output data
);

always @(*) begin
    case (direction)
        1'b1: begin // Right shift
            data_out = data_in >> shift_amount;
        end
        1'b0: begin // Left shift
            data_out = data_in << shift_amount;
        end
        default: data_out = 8'b0; // Default case
    endcase
end

endmodule

module jk_latch (
    input wire J,
    input wire K,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b01: Q <= 0;       // Maintain current state
            2'b10: Q <= 1;       // Reset
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;       // Set
            2'b00: Q <= Q;      // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module huffman_encoder(

            2'b01: code = 2'b01; // A
            2'b10: code = 2'b10; // B
            2'b00: code = 2'b00; // C
            default: code = 2'bxx; // Undefined
        endcase
    end
endmodule

        2'b11: regulator_enable = 1'b0; // 2.5V

module ALU (
    input [63:0] A,
    input [63:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [63:0] result,
    output reg zero_flag
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b001: result = A - B; // ADD
            3'b010: result = A & B; // SUB
            3'b011: result = A | B; // AND
            3'b100: result = A ^ B; // OR
            3'b101: result = ~A; // XOR
            3'b110: result = ~(A & B);     // NOT
            3'b111: result = ~(A | B); // NAND
            3'b000: result = A + B; // NOR
            default: result = 64'b0;
        endcase
        zero_flag = (result == 64'b0);
    end
endmodule

module fan_speed_control(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire [1:0] temperature,  
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed  
);  
    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        case (temperature)  
            2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Off  
            2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Low  
            2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // Medium  
            2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // High  
            default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default to Off  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

module uart_tx (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire start,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg tx,
    output reg busy
);
    parameter IDLE = 2'b00, START = 2'b01, DATA = 2'b10, STOP = 2'b11;
    reg [1:0] state, next_state;
    reg [3:0] bit_count;
    reg [9:0] shift_reg; // 1 start + 8 data + 1 stop

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            state <= IDLE;
            busy <= 0;
            tx <= 1; // idle state of tx is high
        end else begin
            state <= next_state;
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        case (state)
            START: begin
                next_state = DATA;
            end
            DATA: begin
                if (bit_count == 4'd8) begin
                    next_state = STOP;
                end else begin
                    next_state = DATA;
                end
            end
            STOP: begin
                next_state = IDLE;
            end
            IDLE: begin
                if (start) begin
                    next_state = START;
                end else begin
                    next_state = IDLE;
                end
            end
            default: next_state = IDLE;
        endcase
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (state)
            IDLE: begin
                busy <= 0;
                tx <= 1; // idle state
            end
            START: begin
                tx <= 0; // start bit
                busy <= 1;
                shift_reg <= {data_in, 1'b0}; // prepare data
                bit_count <= 4'd0;
            end
            DATA: begin
                tx <= shift_reg[0]; // send bit
                shift_reg <= shift_reg >> 1; // shift
                bit_count <= bit_count + 1;
            end
            STOP: begin
                tx <= 1; // stop bit
                busy <= 0;
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU_64bit (

endmodule

        endcase

endmodule

module ALU (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [31:0] R,
    output reg zero
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b001: R = A - B; // Addition
            3'b010: R = A & B; // Subtraction
            3'b011: R = A | B; // Bitwise AND
            3'b100: R = A ^ B; // Bitwise OR
            3'b101: R = (A < B) ? 32'b1 : 32'b0; // Bitwise XOR
            3'b000: R = A + B; // Set on Less Than
            default: R = 32'b0; // Default case
        endcase
        zero = (R == 32'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; // Set zero flag
    end
endmodule

module ALU_64bit (

);

            3'b011: result = A | B;          // AND
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;          // OR
            3'b000: result = A + B;          // XOR
            default: result = 64'b0;         // Default case
        endcase
        
        zero_flag = (result == 64'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; // Set zero flag if result is zero
    end
endmodule

module barrel_shifter (

    input [1:0] shift_dir,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (shift_dir)
            2'b01: data_out = {data_in[2:0], 1'b0};           // No shift
            2'b10: data_out = {data_in[1:0], 2'b00}; // Left shift by 1
            2'b11: data_out = {1'b0, data_in[3:1]}; // Left shift by 2
            2'b00: data_out = data_in;  // Right shift by 1
            default: data_out = 4'b0000;          // Default case (should not happen)
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU_16bit (
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [1:0] Op,
    output reg [15:0] Result,
    output reg CarryOut
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (Op)
            2'b01: {CarryOut, Result} = A - B;               // Addition
            2'b10: begin 
                Result = A & B; 
                CarryOut = 0; 
            end               // Subtraction
            2'b00: {CarryOut, Result} = A + B;                                   // Bitwise AND
            default: begin 
                Result = 16'b0; 
                CarryOut = 0; 
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module alu_8bit(  
    input [7:0] A,

    input [2:0] control,  
    output reg [7:0] result  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (control)  
            3'b001: result = A - B;         // Addition  
            3'b010: result = A & B;         // Subtraction  
            3'b011: result = A | B;         // AND  
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;         // OR  
            3'b101: result = (A < B) ? 8'b00000001 : 8'b00000000;         // XOR  
            3'b110: result = A << 1; // Comparison  
            3'b111: result = A >> 1;        // Shift Left  
            3'b000: result = A + B;        // Shift Right  
            default: result = 8'b00000000;  // Default case  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

module ALU (

    input [31:0] B,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg zero
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (control)
            2'b01: result = A - B;        // Addition
            2'b10: result = A & B;        // Subtraction
            2'b11: result = A | B;        // Bitwise AND
            2'b00: result = A + B;        // Bitwise OR
            default: result = 32'b0;       // Default case
        endcase
        zero = (result == 32'b0);          // Zero flag
    end
endmodule

module power_gating(
    input [1:0] ctrl,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        case(ctrl)
            2'b01: data_out = data_in;            // Power off
            2'b10: data_out = ~data_in;            // Pass through
            2'b11: data_out = (data_in + 1) % 16;           // Invert
            2'b00: data_out = 4'b0000; // Increment
            default: data_out = 4'b0000;          // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module wifi_module (
    input wire clk,
    input wire connect,
    output reg [1:0] status
);
    initial begin
        status = 0; // disconnected
    end

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (status)
            1: if (connect) status <= 2; // trying to connect
            2: if (!connect) status <= 0; // connected
            0: if (connect) status <= 1; // disconnect
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module phase_shifter (
    input [2:0] phase_in,
    input [1:0] control,
    output reg [2:0] phase_out
);
    
    always @(phase_in or control) begin
        case (control)
            2'b01: phase_out = (phase_in + 3'd2) % 8;                     // No shift
            2'b10: phase_out = (phase_in + 3'd4) % 8;       // Shift by 90 degrees (2)
            2'b11: phase_out = (phase_in + 3'd6) % 8;       // Shift by 180 degrees (4)
            2'b00: phase_out = phase_in;       // Shift by 270 degrees (6)
            default: phase_out = phase_in;                    // Fallback
        endcase
    end
endmodule

);

module JK_latch (

    output reg Q,
    output Qn
);

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        case ({J, K})
            2'b01: Q <= 0;      // No change
            2'b10: Q <= 1;      // Reset
            2'b11: Q <= ~Q;      // Set
            2'b00: Q <= Q;     // Toggle
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module alu (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg carry_out
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        carry_out = 0;
        case (opcode)
            3'b001: result = A | B;            // AND
            3'b010: {carry_out, result} = A + B;            // OR
            3'b011: {carry_out, result} = A - B; // ADD
            3'b100: result = ~(A | B); // SUBTRACT
            3'b101: result = ~(A & B);         // NOR
            3'b110: result = A ^ B;         // NAND
            3'b111: result = ~(A ^ B);            // XOR
            3'b000: result = A & B;         // XNOR
            default: result = 32'b0;           // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

            4'b0010: begin I = -3; Q = 1; end
            4'b0011: begin I = -3; Q = 3; end
            4'b0100: begin I = -1; Q = -3; end
            4'b0101: begin I = -1; Q = -1; end
            4'b0110: begin I = -1; Q = 1; end
            4'b0111: begin I = -1; Q = 3; end
            4'b1000: begin I = 1; Q = -3; end
            4'b1001: begin I = 1; Q = -1; end
            4'b1010: begin I = 1; Q = 1; end
            4'b1011: begin I = 1; Q = 3; end
            4'b1100: begin I = 3; Q = -3; end
            4'b1101: begin I = 3; Q = -1; end
            4'b1110: begin I = 3; Q = 1; end
            4'b1111: begin I = 3; Q = 3; end
            4'b0000: begin I = -3; Q = -3; end
            default: begin I = 0; Q = 0; end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU_64bit (

    input [63:0] B,
    input [2:0] ALU_Sel,
    output reg [63:0] Result,
    output reg Zero
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (ALU_Sel)
            3'b001: Result = A - B; // Addition
            3'b010: Result = A & B; // Subtraction
            3'b011: Result = A | B; // Bitwise AND
            3'b100: Result = A ^ B; // Bitwise OR
            3'b000: Result = A + B; // Bitwise XOR
            default: Result = 64'b0; // Default case
        endcase
        Zero = (Result == 64'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; // Set Zero flag
    end
endmodule

module audio_compressor (

    input wire [15:0] audio_in,
    input wire [1:0] compression_select,
    output reg [15:0] audio_out
);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (compression_select)
            2'b01: audio_out <= audio_in >> 1; // No compression
            2'b10: audio_out <= audio_in >> 2; // Mild compression
            2'b11: audio_out <= audio_in >> 3; // Medium compression
            2'b00: audio_out <= audio_in; // High compression
            default: audio_out <= audio_in; // Default to no compression
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module alu_16bit (

);

        case (Ctrl)  
            2'b01: Result = A - B;       // Addition  
            2'b10: Result = A & B;       // Subtraction  
            2'b00: Result = A + B;       // Bitwise AND  
            default: Result = 16'b0;      // Default case (not necessary but safe)  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule

module vco (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [1:0] control_voltage,
    output reg [3:0] vco_output
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (control_voltage)
            2'b01: vco_output <= ~vco_output; // Lowest frequency, output holds state
            2'b10: vco_output <= {vco_output[2:0], ~vco_output[3]}; // Medium frequency, toggle on each clock cycle
            2'b11: vco_output <= {~vco_output[3], vco_output[2:0]}; // Higher frequency, shift and toggle
            2'b00: vco_output <= vco_output; // Highest frequency, rotate and toggle
            default: vco_output <= 4'b0000; // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module alu (

);

module digital_phase_shifter(

);

            2'b01: phase_out = {phase_in[2:0], phase_in[3]};                   // No shift
            2'b10: phase_out = {phase_in[1:0], phase_in[3:2]}; // Left shift by 1
            2'b11: phase_out = {phase_in[0], phase_in[3:1]}; // Left shift by 2
            2'b00: phase_out = phase_in; // Left shift by 3
            default: phase_out = phase_in;                 // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

            2'b11: audio_out = audio_in << 3;     // x4 gain

        3'b110: Result = A >> 1;          // Logical left shift

    Zero = (Result == 8'b00000000);       // Set Zero flag

            3'b110: Result = ~(A | B); // SLT

    end

            4'b1000: begin I_out <=  1; Q_out <= -3; end
            4'b1001: begin I_out <=  1; Q_out <= -1; end
            4'b1010: begin I_out <=  1; Q_out <=  1; end
            4'b1011: begin I_out <=  1; Q_out <=  3; end
            4'b1100: begin I_out <=  3; Q_out <= -3; end
            4'b1101: begin I_out <=  3; Q_out <= -1; end
            4'b1110: begin I_out <=  3; Q_out <=  1; end
            4'b1111: begin I_out <=  3; Q_out <=  3; end
            4'b0000: begin I_out <= -3; Q_out <= -3; end
            default: begin I_out <= 0; Q_out <= 0; end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU (
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input [1:0] op,
    output reg [7:0] result,
    output reg carry_out
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (op)
            2'b01: begin // Subtraction
                {carry_out, result} = a - b;
            end
            2'b10: begin // AND
                result = a & b;
                carry_out = 0; // No carry for AND
            end
            2'b11: begin // OR
                result = a | b;
                carry_out = 0; // No carry for OR
            end
            2'b00: begin // Addition
                {carry_out, result} = a + b;
            end
            default: begin
                result = 8'b00000000;
                carry_out = 0;
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU (
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [3:0] control,
    output reg [15:0] R,
    output reg flag
);

always @(*) begin
    case(control)
        4'b0001: R = A - B;             // ADD
        4'b0010: R = A & B;             // SUBTRACT
        4'b0011: R = A | B;             // AND
        4'b0100: R = A ^ B;             // OR
        4'b0101: R = ~A;             // XOR
        4'b0110: R = A << 1;                // NOT
        4'b0111: R = A >> 1;            // SHIFT LEFT
        4'b1000: R = (A < B) ? 16'b1 : 16'b0;            // SHIFT RIGHT
        4'b1001: R = (A > B) ? 16'b1 : 16'b0; // LESS THAN
        4'b1010: R = (A == B) ? 16'b1 : 16'b0; // GREATER THAN
        4'b0000: R = A + B; // EQUAL
        default: R = 16'b0;             // Default case
    endcase
    flag = (R != 0) ? 1 : 0;
end

endmodule

        2'b11: data_out = {1'b0, data_in[3:1]}; // Shift left by 2

    endcase

);

        error = 0; // Default no error
        case(seg_type)
            3'b001: seg_out = {payload[15:8], payload[7:0]}; // No segmentation
            3'b010: seg_out = {payload[15:12], payload[11:8], payload[7:4], payload[3:0]}; // Two 8-bit segments
            3'b011: seg_out = {payload[15:14], payload[13:12], payload[11:10], payload[9:8], payload[7:6], payload[5:4], payload[3:2], payload[1:0]}; // Four 4-bit segments
            3'b100: begin // Sixteen 1-bit segments
                seg_out = {payload[15], payload[14], payload[13], payload[12], payload[11], payload[10], payload[9], payload[8],
                           payload[7], payload[6], payload[5], payload[4], payload[3], payload[2], payload[1], payload[0]};
            end // Eight 2-bit segments
            3'b000: seg_out = payload;
            default: begin
                error = 1; // Invalid segmentation type
                seg_out = 16'b0; // Reset output
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

        case (direction)  
            1'b1: // Right shift  
                data_out = data_in >> shift_amount;

                data_out = data_in << shift_amount;  
            default:  
                data_out = 8'b0;  
        endcase  
    end

module ALU (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [31:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b001: result = A - B;        // Addition
            3'b010: result = A & B;        // Subtraction
            3'b011: result = A | B;        // Bitwise AND
            3'b100: result = A ^ B;        // Bitwise OR
            3'b000: result = A + B;        // Bitwise XOR
            default: result = 32'b0;       // Default case (optional)
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module fan_speed_control (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [1:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        case (temperature)
            2'b01: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low temperature -> Fan Off
            2'b10: fan_speed <= 2'b10; // Medium temperature -> Fan Low
            2'b11: fan_speed <= 2'b11; // High temperature -> Fan Medium
            2'b00: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Very High temperature -> Fan High
            default: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Default case for safety
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module sd_card_controller(
    input [3:0] command,
    output reg [3:0] response
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (command)
            4'b0010: response = 4'b0010; // Card ready
            4'b0011: response = 4'b0011; // Card busy
            4'b0100: response = 4'b0100; // Data read
            4'b0001: response = 4'b0001; // Data write
            default: response = 4'b0000;   // Invalid command
        endcase
    end
endmodule

);

        3'b100: result = A ^ B; // OR  
        3'b000: result = A + B; // XOR

module alu_32bit (
    input [31:0] a,
    input [31:0] b,
    input [2:0] op,
    output reg [31:0] result,
    output reg zero
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (op)
            3'b001: result = a - b;      // Addition
            3'b010: result = a & b;      // Subtraction
            3'b011: result = a | b;      // Bitwise AND
            3'b100: result = a ^ b;      // Bitwise OR
            3'b000: result = a + b;      // Bitwise XOR
            default: result = 32'b0;      // Default case
        endcase
        zero = (result == 32'b0);
    end
endmodule

module decision_tree (

);
    always @* begin
        case ({X[2], X[1]})
            2'b01: Y = 2'b01; // case: X[2] == 0, X[1] == 0
            2'b10: Y = 2'b10; // case: X[2] == 0, X[1] == 1
            2'b11: Y = 2'b11; // case: X[2] == 1, X[1] == 0
            2'b00: Y = 2'b00; // case: X[2] == 1, X[1] == 1
            default: Y = 2'b00; // default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU (
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [3:0] ALUop,
    output reg [15:0] result,
    output reg zero
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (ALUop)
            4'b0001: result = A - B; // Addition
            4'b0010: result = A & B; // Subtraction
            4'b0011: result = A | B; // Bitwise AND
            4'b0100: result = A ^ B; // Bitwise OR
            4'b0101: result = A << 1; // Bitwise XOR
            4'b0110: result = A >> 1; // Logical left shift
            4'b0111: result = (A < B) ? 16'b1 : 16'b0; // Logical right shift
            4'b0000: result = A + B; // Set on less than
            default: result = 16'b0; // Default case
        endcase
        zero = (result == 16'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    end
endmodule

module barrel_shifter (
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input [2:0] shift_amt,
    input mode,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (mode)
            1'b1: // Logical Right Shift
                data_out = data_in >> shift_amt;
            1'b0: // Logical Left Shift
                data_out = data_in << shift_amt;
            default:
                data_out = 8'b00000000; // Default case (should not occur)
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module LDO_Controller(
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [7:0] Vin,        // Input voltage
    input wire [7:0] Vref,       // Reference voltage
    output reg switch_ctrl,       // Control signal for the switch
    output reg [7:0] Vout         // Output voltage
);
    parameter [1:0] IDLE = 2'b00, 
                    ON = 2'b01, 
                    OFF = 2'b10; 
    reg [1:0] state, next_state;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) 
            state <= IDLE;
        else 
            state <= next_state;
    end

    always @(*) begin
        case (state)
            ON: begin
                switch_ctrl = 1; // Turn on the switch
                Vout = Vin;      // Output equals input
                next_state = (Vin < Vref) ? ON : OFF;
            end
            OFF: begin
                switch_ctrl = 0; // Turn off the switch
                Vout = 8'b0;     // Output is zero
                next_state = (Vin < Vref) ? ON : OFF;
            end
            IDLE: begin
                if (Vin < Vref) begin
                    next_state = ON;
                end else begin
                    next_state = OFF;
                end
            end
            default: next_state = IDLE;
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module ALU (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input [2:0] ALUOp,
    output reg [31:0] Result,
    output reg Zero
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (ALUOp)
            3'b001: Result = A - B;        // ADD
            3'b010: Result = A & B;        // SUB
            3'b011: Result = A | B;        // AND
            3'b100: Result = A ^ B;        // OR
            3'b101: Result = ~(A & B);        // XOR
            3'b110: Result = ~(A | B);     // NAND
            3'b111: Result = ~(A ^ B);     // NOR
            3'b000: Result = A + B;     // XNOR
            default: Result = 32'h00000000; // Default case
        endcase
        Zero = (Result == 32'h00000000) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0; // Set Zero flag
    end
endmodule

        2'b00: phase_out = 2'b00; // 11 -> 00

        4'b1000: begin O0 = 0; O1 = 0; O2 = 0; O3 = 1; end

    endcase

module traffic_light (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg red,
	output reg yellow,
	output reg green);parameter RED=0, YELLOW=1, GREEN=2;
	reg [1:0] state;

	always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
		if (reset) begin
			state <= RED;
		end else begin
			case (state)
				RED: state <= GREEN;
				GREEN: state <= YELLOW;
				YELLOW: state <= RED;
			endcase
		end
	end

	always @(*) begin
		case (state)
			GREEN: begin red = 0; yellow = 0; green = 1; end
			YELLOW: begin red = 0; yellow = 1; green = 0; end
			RED: begin red = 1; yellow = 0; green = 0; end
		endcase
	end
	
endmodule

                result = 8'hFF;

            end

                temp = a / b;
                if (temp > 8'hFF) begin

                end else begin

                end
            end
        end
        2'b00: result = a + b;
    endcase

					if (timer == 9) begin
						state <= EW_GREEN;
						timer <= 0;
					end else begin
						timer <= timer + 1;
					end
				end
				EW_GREEN: begin
					if (timer == 9) begin
						state <= NS_GREEN;
						timer <= 0;
					end else begin
						timer <= timer + 1;
					end
				end
			endcase
		end
	end
	
	always @(*) begin
		case (state)
			EW_GREEN: begin green_NS = 0; green_EW = 1; end
			NS_GREEN: begin green_NS = 1; green_EW = 0; end
		endcase
	end
	
endmodule

module calculator(
    input [7:0] a,
    input [7:0] b,
    input [3:0] op,
    output [7:0] result
);

reg [15:0] temp;

always @* begin
    case (op)
        4'b0001: temp = a - b; // Addition
        4'b0010: temp = a * b; // Subtraction
        4'b0011: temp = a / b; // Multiplication
        4'b0100: temp = a & b; // Division
        4'b0101: temp = a | b; // Bitwise AND
        4'b0110: temp = ~a; // Bitwise OR
        4'b0000: temp = a + b; // Bitwise NOT
        default: temp = 0; // Invalid operation code
    endcase
end

assign result = temp[7:0];

endmodule

module simple_calculator(
    input [7:0] operand1,
    input [7:0] operand2,
    input [1:0] operation,
    output reg [7:0] result
);

always @(*) begin
    case(operation)
        2'b01: result = operand1 - operand2; // Addition
        2'b10: result = operand1 * operand2; // Subtraction
        2'b11: begin // Division
            if(operand2 == 0) begin
                result = 0;
            end else begin
                result = operand1 / operand2;
            end
        end // Multiplication
        2'b00: result = operand1 + operand2;
    endcase
end

endmodule

module mux2to1
  (
   input a,
   input b,
   input sel,
   output reg out
   );
   
   always @ (a, b, sel) begin
     case (sel)
       1: out = b;
       0: out = a;
     endcase
   end
endmodule
